TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - Level 2 Agreement
TimeEntry.Notes: FalconerofRedlands.com has completed crucial updates, optimizing cache and cart settings to enhance stability and functionality. All SEMrush issues were addressed through updates to robots.txt, XML sitemaps, on-page SEO, and performance improvements, significantly boosting crawlability, indexing, site speed, and search visibility. The site structure, navigation, content, and mobile responsiveness were refined to provide a smoother user experience. Google Tag Manager and analytics were fully configured, and email delivery issues were resolved after successful form testing. The site is now fully optimized for performance, usability, tracking, and long-term growth.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - Level 2 Agreement
TimeEntry.Notes: Noticed the missing H1 heading on FalconofRedlands' website, and worked on adding a proper H1 tag to improve SEO and ensure better structure for both search engines and user experience.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - Level 2 Agreement
TimeEntry.Notes: I conducted a thorough audit of the Falcon website using SEMrush to evaluate its SEO performance. This involved analyzing key metrics such as site speed and technical issues. By identifying potential problems and optimization opportunities, I provided actionable insights aimed at improving the site's visibility and search engine rankings. The audit results were used to develop a strategy for enhancing the website’s overall SEO health and performance.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - Level 2 Agreement
TimeEntry.Notes: Update Rich Results on Google & AI Search with JSON-LD Schema for Wix content for and ai seo for llms optimized

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - Level 2 Agreement
TimeEntry.Notes: Checked and resolved technical errors on falconerofredlands.com, improving site functionality, fixing broken links, optimizing performance, and ensuring a seamless user experience while enhancing overall website health and reliability.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - Level 2 Agreement
TimeEntry.Notes: Conducted a comprehensive SEO audit of the Falcon website using SEMrush and Hoth SEO tools. Analyzed key SEO factors such as site speed, crawlability, and on-page optimization. Identified critical SEO health issues, performance gaps, and areas for improvement, providing actionable insights to enhance search engine rankings, improve user experience, and boost overall site performance.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - Level 2 Agreement
TimeEntry.Notes:
Falcone.com has successfully implemented major updates to enhance its SEO strategy, focusing on Google Rich Results and AI search visibility. By integrating JSON-LD Schema, the website's structured data has been optimized to improve how content is understood and displayed in search results. These changes are specifically designed to boost visibility in both traditional and AI-powered searches, ensuring the site ranks higher and appears more prominently in search engine results.

Additionally, Falcone.com has optimized its content for Learning Management Systems (LMS) by leveraging AI-driven SEO strategies. This includes improving keyword targeting, refining metadata, and aligning content with user intent for educational materials, courses, and related content. AI tools have been utilized to streamline keyword research, targeting long-tail, high-intent keywords, ensuring that all content is aligned with the latest SEO trends and user behaviors.

Together, these updates improve content discoverability, engagement, and search visibility, providing a foundation for sustained SEO growth and ensuring the site is well-positioned to attract both human users and AI-driven search engines.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - Level 2 Agreement
TimeEntry.Notes:
Falcone.com has successfully implemented significant updates to enhance its SEO strategy, focusing on Google Rich Results and AI search visibility. By integrating JSON-LD Schema, the website's structured data has been optimized to improve how content is understood and displayed in search results, boosting visibility in both traditional and AI-powered searches for higher rankings.

In addition, Falcone.com has optimized its content for Learning Management Systems (LMS) by leveraging AI-driven SEO techniques. This includes refining keyword targeting, improving metadata, and aligning content with user intent for educational materials and courses. AI tools have been used to streamline keyword research, focusing on long-tail, high-intent keywords, ensuring the content aligns with the latest SEO trends and user behaviors.

These updates collectively enhance content discoverability, engagement, and search visibility, setting a strong foundation for sustained SEO growth and ensuring the site attracts both human users and AI-driven search engines.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - Level 2 Agreement
TimeEntry.Notes: Performed a comprehensive audit of the Falcon website, assessing technical performance, site architecture, on-page SEO, mobile usability, and overall user experience. Tested site speed using performance analysis tools to measure load times, Core Web Vitals, server response, image optimization. Identified technical issues and optimization gaps, delivering clear recommendations to enhance speed, functionality, search rankings, and user engagement.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - Level 2 Agreement
TimeEntry.Notes: Falcone.com has successfully rolled out a series of impactful updates to enhance its SEO strategy, with a strong emphasis on Google Rich Results and AI search visibility. By integrating JSON-LD Schema, the website’s structured data has been optimized to improve how content is interpreted and presented in search results, increasing visibility in both traditional and AI-driven searches, leading to higher rankings.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - Level 2 Agreement
TimeEntry.Notes: Falcone.com has implemented a series of strategic updates to boost its SEO performance, focusing on enhancing visibility in Google Rich Results and AI-driven searches. By integrating JSON-LD Schema, the website's structured data has been optimized, improving how content is interpreted and displayed in search results. This enhancement not only elevates the site’s presence in traditional search but also increases its visibility in AI-powered searches, ultimately contributing to higher rankings and improved online visibility.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - Level 2 Agreement
TimeEntry.Notes: Today I checked the Falcon site on SEMrush, running a full audit to assess site health metrics. I analyzed technical SEO, performance scores,crawlability, and mobile optimization.
